subcodes.first_line: O Sultan! Hearken unto the call of the Sovereign from before the Throne of thy Lord, the All-Bountiful, that it may detach thee from all that hath been created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سلطان اسمع ندآء السلطان عن جهه عرش ربک المنان لینقطعک عما خلق فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @chastisement and requital
